vssignalsaddons:block-handbooktext-cowpe: Temperature sensor for cowper stoves. Must be placed on the outside of the stove so that its one block between itself and a radiator inside the stove.
vssignalsaddons:block-handbooktext-pipe-: Pipe valve that is signal-network controlled. Giving a signal with strength 1 or above on its input will open the valve. No manual operation allowed.

Pipe section that allows monitoring of pipe network temperature through signals. The alarm output will be outputting a 15 signal strength when the temperature goes above the set value. The level sensor outputs a 15-level signal scaled between 0 and 2000.

Pipe section that allows monitoring of pipe network pressure through signals. The alarm output will be outputting a 15 signal strength when the pressure goes above the set value. The level sensor outputs a 15-level signal scaled between 0 and pipe burst pressure
